name: Ukupakishwa kwenxeba leHemostatic
description: Ukupakishwa kwenxeba elingacinezelekiyo okanye elidibeneyo kunye ne-hemostatic gauze ukulawula ukuphuma kwegazi apho i-tourniquet ayinakusetyenziswa.
steps: Don iiglavu. Liveze ngokupheleleyo inxeba usebenzisa izikere zokwenzakala.
Chonga umthombo wokopha osebenzayo kumngxuma wenxeba.
Vula i-hemostatic gauze kwaye uyipakishe ngokuqinileyo enxebeni ngomnwe wakho, uyityhalele ngqo kwindawo yokopha.
Qhubeka upakisha de umgodi wenxeba uzaliswe ngokupheleleyo.
Faka isicelo esiqinileyo, uxinzelelo oluqhubekayo oluthe ngqo ngesithende sesandla sakho ubuncinci bemizuzu emi-3.
Sukususa nayiphi na imathiriyeli yokupakisha xa sele uyifakile.
Phawula ixesha kwikhadi le-TCCC okanye ibunzi lesigulane (umzekelo, 'PKD 0145').
warnings: UNGApakishi amanxeba agqobhozayo esifubeni -- sebenzisa isifuba endaweni yoko.
Ukuba upakisha inxeba lentamo, faka uxinzelelo ngaphandle kokucinezela zombini ii-carotids ngaxeshanye.
Phinda uvavanye kwimizuzu emi-5 ukuba kukrokreleka umthombo wemithambo.

pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-gauze encinci ngokulinganayo. Faka isicelo soxinzelelo olulula ukuze ugweme ukunyanzeliswa kwe-thoracic kwiintsana.

obstetric.note: Kuphephe ukupakisha uxinzelelo olunzulu okanye olunobundlobongela kufutshane nesisu se-gravid. Ukunyuka ngokukhawuleza kuyakhethwa.
